title: Ibervillea millspaughii
taxonomy: Ibervillea millspaughii is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Ibervillea millspaughii is commonly known as Millspaugh's gourd or Millspaugh's melon. It belongs to the genus Ibervillea and is a perennial vine. Ibervillea millspaughii is a member of the large and diverse cucurbit family, which includes other common plants like cucumbers and squash.
